description: Diagnose why the LocalWorkforceRegistry fails to update operator approval status if the model ID contains spaces.
expected_outcome: Identifies SQL injection risk or parameter binding issue and proposes a fix.

description: Identify the cause of the RecursionError in the SkillApplicabilityEngine when a skill depends on itself.
expected_outcome: Points out missing cycle detection in the skill DAG traversal.

description: Find out why MissionContract validation succeeds when budget max_steps is zero.
expected_outcome: Discovers missing validation logic in MissionBudget pydantic model.

description: Add a new endpoint to list all historically admitted hardware configurations.
expected_outcome: Adds GET /api/v1/hardware-admissions route and related DB query.

description: Include the date of approval in the LocalWorkforceRegistry model response.
expected_outcome: Alters schema to add approved_at timestamp and updates API serialization.

description: Create a toggle on the MissionControlPanel to show/hide completed missions.
expected_outcome: Adds a React state toggle and filters the rendered mission list.

description: Wire the IntelligenceHiringPanel to display live SSE updates of hiring proposals.
expected_outcome: Connects an EventSource to /api/v1/hiring/stream and updates zustand store.

description: Implement the "Accept" button on a HiringProposal to call the backend POST /hiring/{id}/accept endpoint.
expected_outcome: Adds onClick handler making a fetch POST and optimistic UI update.

description: Display detailed error messages from the MaintenanceLifecycleEngine in the MaintenanceCenterPanel.
expected_outcome: Parses the 400 Bad Request JSON response and displays it in a toast notification.

description: Fix the test_local_workforce_registry.py test that fails due to a mismatched argument count on update_approval.
expected_outcome: Removes the extraneous argument from the test call.

description: Fix flakiness in test_cortex_bus.py caused by concurrent sqlite writes.
expected_outcome: Adds a retry_on_locked decorator or serializes the test database access.

description: Repair the frontend test suite that fails because useMirrorStore is not mocked properly.
expected_outcome: Mocks the zustand store using vi.mock in the test setup.

description: Determine if the current version of pytest-cov is compatible with Python 3.14.
expected_outcome: Reads pyproject.toml, checks changelogs, and confirms/upgrades version.

description: Analyze the impact of updating React from 18 to 19 on the ProductSpaces component.
expected_outcome: Identifies potential issues with concurrent rendering or deprecated hooks.

description: Check if the project uses any dependencies with known CVEs in the cryptography package.
expected_outcome: Runs a vulnerability scan or checks lockfile against known databases.

description: Document the new MaintenanceLifecycleEngine architecture in GAGOS_ARCHITECTURE.md.
expected_outcome: Adds a section describing the scanner, durable findings, and canonical repair bridges.

description: Write a tutorial on how to add a new skill to the SkillLibrary using the CLI.
expected_outcome: Creates docs/tutorials/add_skill.md with step-by-step instructions.

description: Document the expected JSON schema for a HiringProposal payload.
expected_outcome: Adds a markdown table or OpenAPI spec snippet for the HiringProposal payload.

description: Extract the duplicated SQLite connection logic into a shared database utility.
expected_outcome: Creates aios/memory/db_utils.py and refactors registry and hiring modules.

description: Refactor the React panels to use a shared Card component for consistency.
expected_outcome: Creates a Card.jsx and replaces raw divs in LocalWorkforcePanel and others.

description: Simplify the complex nested if-statements in SkillApplicabilityEngine._match_profiles.
expected_outcome: Returns early or uses a strategy pattern to flatten logic.

description: Remove dead code in aios/api/routes/legacy_auth.py.
expected_outcome: Deletes the file and removes its router inclusion in main.py.

description: Update all copyright headers to 2026.
expected_outcome: Performs a global find-and-replace on copyright year comments.

description: Migrate the legacy CSS modules in the dashboard to Tailwind classes.
expected_outcome: Replaces imported CSS module classes with equivalent Tailwind utility classes.

description: Simulate a crashed mission and write a script to manually transition it to FAILED in SQLite.
expected_outcome: Provides a SQL UPDATE statement or python script to repair the state.

description: Implement an automatic rollback if a MaintenanceMissionBridge fails to stage its workspace.
expected_outcome: Adds a try/except block that calls rollback_registry on failure.

description: Recover a corrupted skill signature by re-hashing its source content.
expected_outcome: Creates a utility function to recalculate and update the hash in DB.

description: Audit the LocalWorkforceRegistry for potential command injection vulnerabilities.
expected_outcome: Reviews how model_id is used and ensures strict string validation/escaping.

description: Verify that the /api/v1/skills endpoint cannot access files outside the skills directory.
expected_outcome: Checks for Path traversal checks (e.g., ensuring resolved paths are within root).

description: Ensure that the EmergencyStopController cannot be bypassed by an unauthenticated user.
expected_outcome: Confirms the presence of @require_privileged_session decorator on the route.
